title: Manufacturing Engineer - RINL South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - RINL South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RINL South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RINL South Asia Partners:
RINL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL South Asia Partners!
